rationale: The cited paper (Sahni 2016) appears in the citing article only as part of a grouped literature-list citation on digital advertising dynamics, specifically prior work on spillover effects. The citing paper does not discuss Sahni 2016's findings in detail, build hypotheses from it, reuse its design, or use it for interpretation of results. Because the citation serves broad background positioning rather than a distinct functional role in the paper's core argument, the relation is best classified as a passing mention.
